THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARNER, GENEVA GARNER, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1816 SUNNYDALE $2,544.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,544.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-06-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, NOON. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEFT WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT.
